name: twenty-nine
description: Production-quality Twenty-Nine (29) card game — engine, CLI, multiplayer, AI

scripts.build: npm run build -w @twenty-nine/core && npm run build -w @twenty-nine/shared && npm run build -w @twenty-nine/cli && npm run build -w @twenty-nine/server && npm run build -w @twenty-nine/client
scripts.dev: npm run build:core && concurrently -n server,client -c blue,green "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:client"
